notes: Crashes to desktop with no error
title: Amnesia™: Memories

notes:
Tried on Arch, latest Mesa and Proton versions. Black screen, then the game would quit. No error messages, just closed after a few seconds.

As there was no info online, I'll try to manually install the required redistributables, etc after seeing what it includes when I install the game on Windows and find out what they are.

For now, here's the Proton log. https://pastebin.com/zA1hLCXP
title: Amnesia™: Memories

notes:
The game requires directx9 to be installed via winetricks.
The videos don't work even after installing the required codec packs & gstreamer plugins. If the game still crashes after installing directx9, it's likely due to the videos. In which case, rename the movie subdirectory of the game to movie.bkp to disable them.
title: Amnesia™: Memories
